kept.text:
not so alpha 

replit is turning 10 and they have a 24hrs free day shipping without payment 

if you have any idea especially like a personal website or personal project you wanna do 

it’s been live for like 7hrs and all but building with replit takes lesser than hours depending on what you wanna cook 

> go to link in quote 
> click start for free 
> it takes you to the main site, create an account 
> then click that agent message, input number and it send you code to paste 
> and you are live to build whatever you want, no obstruction

just choose any of the option and prompt your way to that app 🧸

kept.text:
Congratulations on 10 years @Replit and thanks for making Agent free during the anniversary period.

I wanted to flag an issue with phone verification. Attempts using local numbers consistently fail immediately, and several others I’ve spoken with are experiencing the same behavior. Interestingly, using a dummy US number progresses to the code entry step without issue.

Could you clarify whether this is an intentional regional restriction or an unintended bug? If it’s the latter, it would be great to see it resolved before the free access period ends so more users can participate.

Appreciate your attention to this.

profile_bio.description: Thinkoor...✍️

kept.text:
Thanks to Replit’s free day, I finally built an old idea I’ve had for a while.

Its a very early version, but I am trying to explore something that could actually make sense onchain.

MonArena = a prediction battle arena  
→ coins + NFT floor bets  
→ 1v1 battles  
→ winner takes the pool  

Still rough, still testing…but playable.

If you want to try it:

https://t.co/fZGkrrs6At

Would really appreciate any brutal feedback.

UI, flow, ideas,everything helps.

Lets see if this is worth pushing further.

thank u @buildanythingso
@waleedk707 @Replit @amasad Night gathers, and now my watch begins 🫡

kept.text:
Etkinliklerdeki Soru-Cevap kaosunu profesyonel bir akışa çevirdim 🎤

Yıllar içinde katıldığım veya organize ettiğim sayısız etkinlikte, "Sorusu olan var mı?" anının ne kadar kritik ama bir o kadar da yönetilmesi zor olduğunu gördüm. Mikrofon peşinde koşarken kaliteli soruların arada kaybolması, etkinliğin genel algısını bile olumsuz etkileyebiliyor.

Dün sevgili @altugx bir post paylaştı. Vibecoding platformu @Replit, 10.  yaş gününe özel bir kampanya yapmıştı. Ben de farklı araçları deneyimlemek adına Event QnA isimli bir proje geliştirdim.

Amacım basitti: Etkinliklerdeki soru-cevap akışını kaostan profesyonel bir deneyime dönüştürmek ve uçtan uca interaktif bir deneyim yaratmak.

Event QnA nedir?

Katılımcıların bir QR kod taramasıyla anında sisteme dahil olup genel veya konuşmacılara direkt soru sorabildiği, diğer soruları görüp oylayabildiği ve en iyi soruları öne çıkarabildiği interaktif bir platform. Moderatörler, gerçek zamanlı bir panelden soruları onaylayabiliyor, "Projector Mode" özelliğiyle sahne ekranına yansıtabiliyor. Cevaplanacak soruyu Spotlight yaparak direkt gösterebiliyor.

Tüm bu süreç gerçek zamanlı olarak çalışıyor. 

Deneyim çok akıcı:
✅ QR Giriş: Kayıt yok, sadece tara ve sorunu sor
✅ Oylama: En kaliteli soruları katılımcılar seçsin
✅ Canlı Feed: Admin onaylı sorular anında dev ekranda
✅ Full Kontrol: Spotlight, moderasyon ve CSV dışa aktarma

Hem Türkçe hem İngilizce desteğiyle global bir yapı kurguladım. Dark/Light mode ve hızıyla, profesyonel etkinliklerin havasını değiştirecek bir araç oldu.🌐

Fikir aşamasından çalışan bir ürüne dönüştürme sürecinde Replit'i de denemiş oldum ve beğendim👏🏻

kept.text:
I created a game? 👀

Yeah… and it turned into something way more addictive than I expected.

🔥Welcome to @the10kSquad ARENA - a fast-paced survival game where your only goal is simple:

Don’t get hit. Survive. Climb. Repeat.

---

🎮 HOW IT WORKS

You control your character and dodge enemies falling from above.  
Sounds easy… until it isn’t.

With every wave:
• A new character enters the arena  
• The speed increases  
• The game becomes more intense  

At first, you feel in control.  
Then the game starts controlling you.

---

 💻BEST WAY TO PLAY

For now, the best experience is on desktop:  
smooth controls, full movement, and maximum precision.

📱 The game is also playable on mobile, BUT:
- It’s still being improved  
- Landscape mode is recommended  
- Portrait and controls need more polish  

Mobile version is coming… but not final yet.

---

🚀 PLAY HERE:  
[ https://t.co/obCcvlYan1 ]

💬 Drop your feedback in the comments .

I’m building this with the community.

---

🦜 MEET THE SQUAD (WAVES 1–8)

Each wave introduces a new personality from the community:

1. Afonsito  @afonso003_ 
2. Oscar Legendary Artist  @Oscarfortunes 
3. Incognito Wow  @Rushna71 
4. Marinaaaaaaaaaa @marinap97pan 
5. Pablo Always In Chat  @pabloo669 
6. NiceNeys Bullish  @niceneys86 
7. Bartman The Great  @BartMonSignals 
8. PURESOUL (Final Boss 👑) @puresoul0109 

You’re not just playing the game —  
you’re playing against the squad.

🙏 Huge thanks to:
@buildanythingso — for the knowledge  
@monad — for the opportunity  
@Replit — for free access that made this possible  

I managed to bring at least the desktop version to a playable state thanks to this stack.

Still a lot to improve…  
but that’s the fun part.

---

Try it.

Just one run.

Let’s see how far you get 😈

They said "build something for our 10th birthday." 

So I built a playground (literally)

Three AI-generated games. One global leaderboard. Pure competition.

Welcome to Replit Arcade. Where every round is fresh, and the crowd decides who's on top. https://t.co/2uM0fnPVG6
